jsonLd.title: Hiring Category Manager at Meesho
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Meesho. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Category Manager to strengthen our Raipur-based team.

About Meesho:
Meesho is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Magento

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Meesho!
